LanguageData.ABY_CircleRitual_Warden_Desc: Consumes one warden sigil, routes a colonist to the circle, and calls the first disciplined mini-boss breach. The Warden of Ash enters as a heavy infernal overseer with a chest-portal core, ash pulse pressure, and staged imp reinforcement triggers.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRitual_Warden_Rewards: • Guaranteed Ashen Core recovery on kill • Residue payout plus a real mini-boss progression step • Clean bridge between early hostile packs and the first true boss
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRitual_Warden_SideEffects: • Spawns a hostile armored mini-boss instead of a simple pack • Emits close-range ash pulses that punish clustering and melee swarms • Chest-portal phases open imp reinforcements as the Warden loses health
LanguageData.ABY_WardenSummonSuccessDesc: The sigil has taken. A disciplined ash breach has formed and the Warden of Ash is crossing into local space.
